prompt: Create a custom corporate presentation theme called `theme-dense-corporate.css`. It must include a global header and footer offset configuration, styling for lists and cards, and be highly optimized for text-heavy academic slides with dense information (e.g. typical slides have 5+ bullet points and code blocks). Additionally, design it with a professional slate-blue color palette. Ensure the text is highly readable (meeting WCAG AA contrast ratio of 4.5:1), colors are derived using relative color syntax, and the heading margins are dynamically adjusted relative to the header offsets so there is no text overlap. Provide a sample HTML slide structure to demonstrate a dense slide with a header and footer.
assertions: Text and background colors meet WCAG AA contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1
Heading top padding satisfies the dynamic formula against the peripheral offset and font size to avoid overlap
Compact sizing scale (fonts and gaps) is applied for high content density slides
Matrix colors are derived from base colors using relative color syntax
